chapter_title: Logical Alphabet and Number Sequence Test

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Number of letters skipped in between adjacent letters in the series decreases by one. Which of the following series is observing the rule?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Number of letters skipped in between adjacent letters in the series increases by one. Which of the following series observes this rule?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following series observes the rule, "skip in between adjacent letters, increasing one letter more each time to build a set of letters"?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Number of letters skipped in between the adjacent letters in the series are consecutive odd number. Which of the following series observes this rule?

solutions.solution: (C) Let us see R V Z D H L with gaps +4 +4 +4 +4 +4. Now, it is clear that option (c) is correct answer.
(C) From the given question, U R O L I F with gaps -3 -3 -3 -3 -3. Clearly, only option (c) has the required group of letters.
(D) Let us see M O R T Y X with gaps +2 +3 +2 +5 -1. Clearly, only option (D) is having the group of letters which is not according to the general rule.
(D) As per the question, O M J F A with gaps -2 -3 -4 -5. Clearly, only option (b) follows the given rule.
(d) According to the question, S D H K with gaps -15 +4 +3. Clearly, only option (d) is having the letters according to the given rule.
(d) From the given question, D B Y U P with gaps -2 +23 -4 -5. Now, it is clear that only option P is a group of letters which follows the given rule.
(d) From the given question, K M P T Y with gaps +2 +3 +4 +5. Clearly, only KMPTY having the series according to the given rule.
(a) From the given question, A D F I K N with gaps +3 +2 +3 +2 +3. Clearly, only option (a) is having the given pattern in the question.
